subject: [feature request] low-pass filter option
body:
Hi Dimitry,

I'm working with floppy particles that tend to come close together in the 
ice. When picking particles for retraining, I've found it very useful to 
flip denoise on and off to pick single particles near each other. It'd be 
nice if there is a low-pass filter option to use when denoise is off. I 
suppose it could be combined with deconvolve option; one could set power 
and cutoff to 0 and adjust low pass and high pass filters. 

Thanks.

Reza
